question: Which country has the most of TV Channels? List the country and number of TV Channels it has.

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfTVChannels
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY NumberOfTVChannels DESC
LIMIT 1;
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS NumberOfTVChannels
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY NumberOfTVChannels DESC
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:

FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country

LIMIT 1;

What is the TV Channel that shows the cartoon "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"? List the TV Channel's series name.

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT T1.series_name 
FROM TV_Channel AS T1 
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 
ON T1.id = T2.Channel 
WHERE LOWER(T2.Title) = LOWER('The Rise of the Blue Beetle!');
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT T1.series_name 
FROM TV_Channel AS T1 
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 
ON T1.id = T2.Channel 
WHERE T2.Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!';

final_sql:
SELECT T1.series_name 
FROM TV_Channel AS T1 
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 
ON T1.id = T2.Channel 
WHERE T2.Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!';

question: Find the series name and country of the tv channel that is playing some cartoons directed by Ben Jones and Michael Chang?

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT DISTINCT tc.series_name, tc.Country
FROM TV_Channel tc
JOIN Cartoon c ON tc.id = c.Channel
WHERE LOWER(c.Directed_by) = LOWER('Ben Jones')
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT tc.series_name, tc.Country
FROM TV_Channel tc
JOIN Cartoon c ON tc.id = c.Channel
WHERE LOWER(c.Directed_by) = LOWER('Michael Chang');
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT DISTINCT tc.series_name, tc.Country
FROM TV_Channel tc
JOIN Cartoon c ON tc.id = c.Channel
WHERE c.Directed_by IN ('Ben Jones', 'Michael Chang');

final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tc.series_name, tc.Country
FROM TV_Channel tc
JOIN Cartoon c ON tc.id = c.Channel
WHERE c.Directed_by IN ('Ben Jones', 'Michael Chang');

question: What is the series name and country of all TV channels that are playing cartoons directed by Ben Jones and cartoons directed by Michael Chang?

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.series_name, T1.Country
FROM TV_Channel AS T1
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel
WHERE T2.Directed_by = 'Ben Jones'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT T1.series_name, T1.Country
FROM TV_Channel AS T1
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel
WHERE T2.Directed_by = 'Michael Chang';
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT DISTINCT tc.series_name, tc.Country
FROM TV_Channel tc
JOIN Cartoon c1 ON tc.id = c1.Channel
JOIN Cartoon c2 ON tc.id = c2.Channel
WHERE c1.Directed_by = 'Ben Jones' AND c2.Directed_by = 'Michael Chang';

final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.series_name, T1.Country
FROM TV_Channel AS T1
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel
WHERE T2.Directed_by = 'Ben Jones'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT T1.series_name, T1.Country
FROM TV_Channel AS T1
JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel
WHERE T2.Directed_by = 'Michael Chang';
